---
title: "zealhmm"
subtitle: "Teosinte-introgression QTL recovery under low-coverage genotyping"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: foundations-calling
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Genotype likelihoods"
        path: analysis/genotype_likelihoods_and_hmm.qmd
        description: "GL → posterior → call; where the prior lives; what accumulation can and cannot do"
      - title: "Resolving dosage"
        path: analysis/snp50k_genotype_identifiability.qmd
        description: "Why SNP50K skim can't resolve het/hom dosage — rare-allele prior + outbred-donor dilution"
      - title: "Emission by depth"
        path: analysis/emission_by_depth_regime.qmd
        description: "When read counts earn their keep vs a hard genotype"
  - id: foundations
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Coverage theory"
        path: analysis/missing-data-coverage-theory.qmd
        description: "Poisson coverage model — the missing-data baseline"
      - title: "Floor model"
        path: analysis/missing-data-floor-model.qmd
        description: "Exponential-with-floor missingness, fit to ZEAL BAM alignments"
      - title: "Model comparison"
        path: analysis/missing-data-model-comparison.qmd
        description: "Floor model across WGS, Wideseq, and SNP50K datasets"
      - title: "Ergodicity assumption"
        path: analysis/wideseq-coverage-ergodicity.qmd
        description: "Scale-invariance of missing(λ) — the per-sample coverage model transfers to the per-bin scale"
  - id: methods
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Single-locus validation"
        path: analysis/single-locus-validation.qmd
        description: "Does the simcross BC2S3 simulator reproduce the breeding-scheme genotype frequencies? (native v5 map)"
      - title: "Ancestry callers"
        path: analysis/callers-and-methods.qmd
        description: "nNIL, RTIGER, LB-Impute, binhmm, control"
      - title: "Pedigree caller"
        path: analysis/pedigree-caller-validation.qmd
        description: "Family-coupled belief propagation on a ZEAL-structured cohort (82 founders, ~17 lines/founder): parity with per-individual callers + full-grid missing-data fill, not an accuracy gain (needs nilHMM caller='pedigree', PR #10)"
      - title: "Simulation calibration"
        path: analysis/simulation-calibration.qmd
        description: "Two-stage simcross parameter search (calibrate on sim, validate on truth)"
      - title: "nNIL calibration foil"
        path: analysis/nnil-calibration-foil.qmd
        description: "calibration insensitivity to the intermarker recombination fraction and sensitivity to the non-informative rate"
      - title: "nNIL sim calibration"
        path: analysis/nnil-sim-calibration.qmd
        description: "Calibrating the emission nir on a count-from-parents simcross reproduces Zhong et al.'s scarce SNP-chip calibration, giving the same calls on real GBS"
      - title: "GWAS-landscape geometry"
        path: analysis/GWAS_autocorrelation.qmd
        description: "Framework: rank ancestry callers by the spatial coherence (autocorrelation / band-limited noise) of the GWAS profile"
  - id: teonam-recovery
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "STAM · GWAS + coverage sweep (native)"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery.qmd
        description: "STAM Manhattan (Chen Fig 4C) on real genotypes + coverage sweep, native map"
      - title: "STAM · GWAS + coverage sweep (118K)"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-118k.qmd
        description: "Same, on the authentic 118,838-SNP Chen 2019 panel"
      - title: "STAM · MLM five-caller sweep (118K)"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "STAM MLM (Family + K), five-caller coverage-degradation sweep"
      - title: "DTA · MLM five-caller sweep (118K)"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "DTA MLM (Family + K) sweep + noisiness — robustness on a 2nd trait"
  - id: teonam-fig4c
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "STAM · MLM (Q + K), 118K"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "Chen's exact Fig-4C model (5 PCs + Centered-IBS K, P3D) on the authentic 118K + QQ/λ"
      - title: "STAM · MLM (Q + K), interpolated"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated.qmd
        description: "Same model on the interpolated map panel; OLS → MLM inflation comparison"
  - id: teonam-calmap
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Caller calibration"
        path: analysis/teonam-caller-calibration.qmd
        description: "Per-coverage caller parameters (rigidity/rrate/recombdist) by min-FDR on simulated truth"
      - title: "Genetic map"
        path: analysis/teonam-genetic-map.qmd
        description: "Native v5 R/qtl composite genetic map"
      - title: "Marker thinning"
        path: analysis/marker-thinning.qmd
        description: "cM thinning as a Max Distance-d Independent Set"
  - id: teonam-supp
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "STAM · OLS computation (118K)"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "Per-marker across-family OLS on the 118K panel — computation, model & QC"
      - title: "STAM · OLS computation (family-imputed)"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed.qmd
        description: "Per-marker OLS on the FSFHap family-imputed panel — computation & QC"
  - id: zeal-methods
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "RTIGER vs nilHMM"
        path: analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.qmd
        description: "Ancestry-call agreement between callers"
      - title: "nilHMM painting"
        path: analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.qmd
        description: "Ancestry-painting sanity check"
      - title: "Source/method comparison"
        path: analysis/source-method-comparison.qmd
        description: "Genotype-source and method comparisons"
  - id: zeal-pop
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "DTA · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "DTA: JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "PH · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-ph-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Plant height: JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, dwarf/GA candidates, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "EH · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-eh-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Ear height: per-field SpATS BLUE; JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, dwarf/GA/BR height candidates (Peiffer 2014), 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "EN · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-en-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Ear number: per-field SpATS BLUE; JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, ear-number / prolificacy candidates (core gt1/tb1/tru1 + inflorescence-architecture genes), 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "Prolif · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-prolif-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Prolificacy (>1 ear): per-field SpATS BLUE; JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, shares the ear-number / prolificacy candidate panel (gt1=prol1.1, tb1, tru1 + branching/meristem genes), 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "NBR · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-nbr-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Brace-root number (shoot-borne nodal roots): per-field SpATS BLUE; JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, curated brace-root candidate panel (auxin/ARF/AP2 regulators rtcs1/ZmARF11/ZmRAP2.7 + shoot-borne-root initiation + lateral-root modifiers), 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "LAE · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-lae-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Leaves above ear (leaf/node number, CLY25): per-field SpATS BLUE; JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, TU1-centric leaf-number candidate panel (tu1/tunicate1 ZMM19 upstream + its plastochron/meristem targets), 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "SPAD · spatial BLUE · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-spad-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Leaf greenness (SPAD/chlorophyll): single spatially-corrected SpATS BLUE from the CLY25 fieldbook SPAD column; 18-gene chlorophyll panel; JLM + MLM, five-caller comparison, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "SPAD 20DAS · as-is · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-spad20das-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "SPAD greenness at 20 days after sowing; zealbrowser (Bzea_merged) value used as-is, per-line, no spatial correction; same chlorophyll panel, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "SPAD 36DAS · as-is · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-spad36das-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "SPAD greenness at 36 days after sowing; zealbrowser (Bzea_merged) value used as-is, per-line, no spatial correction; same chlorophyll panel, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "DTS · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dts-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Days to silk (flowering): JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, flowering candidates, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "StPi · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-stpi-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Stem pigment (anthocyanin): binary 0–1 score modeled as empirical logit (no spatial correction); JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, anthocyanin-pathway candidates, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "StPu · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-stpu-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Stem pubescence (macrohairs): binary 0–1 score modeled as empirical logit (no spatial correction); JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, mhl1/inv9f + trichome candidates, prior qMH overlay, 1000-perm FWER"
      - title: "Kinki · 1000-perm FWER"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-kinki-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "Kinki (zigzag culm; Eyster 1920): CLY23-only ordinal severity binarized and modeled as empirical logit (no spatial correction); JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison, culm/meristem-architecture candidates anchored on gn1/knox4 + classical zg1 interval, 1000-perm FWER"
  - id: zeal-rqtl
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "DTA · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-dta-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Days to anthesis: classic R/qtl (bcsft) interval mapping (Haley–Knott) on the RTIGER mosaic projected onto the TeoNAM JLM grid; LOD profile + airmine multi-peak refinement + per-family scans; flowering candidate panel (ZmCCT10/9, zcn8/12, dlf1, tu1) — recovers ZmCCT10 on chr10"
      - title: "DTS · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-dts-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Days to silk: same R/qtl pipeline; flowering candidate panel; chr10 support interval spans ZmCCT10"
      - title: "PH · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-ph-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Plant height: R/qtl LOD profile + multi-peak + per-family scans; dwarf/GA/BR height candidate panel"
      - title: "EH · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-eh-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Ear height: R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; dwarf/GA/BR height candidate panel"
      - title: "EN · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-en-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Ear number: R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; ear-number / prolificacy candidate panel (gt1/tb1/tru1 + inflorescence architecture)"
      - title: "Prolif · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-prolif-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Prolificacy (>1 ear): R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; shares the ear-number / prolificacy candidate panel"
      - title: "NBR · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-nbr-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Brace-root number: R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; brace-root candidate panel"
      - title: "LAE · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-lae-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Leaves above ear: R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; TU1-centric leaf-number candidate panel (tu1/tunicate1 + plastochron/meristem targets)"
      - title: "SPAD · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-spad-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Leaf greenness (SPAD): R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; chlorophyll candidate panel"
      - title: "SPAD 20DAS · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-spad20das-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Leaf greenness at 20 days after sowing (as-is per-line value): R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; chlorophyll candidate panel"
      - title: "SPAD 36DAS · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-spad36das-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Leaf greenness at 36 days after sowing (as-is per-line value): R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; chlorophyll candidate panel"
      - title: "StPi · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-stpi-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Stem pigment (anthocyanin): binary 0–1 score as empirical logit; R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; anthocyanin-pathway candidate panel"
      - title: "StPu · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-stpu-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Stem pubescence (macrohairs): binary 0–1 score as empirical logit; R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; mhl1/inv9f + trichome candidate panel"
      - title: "Kinki · R/qtl"
        path: analysis/zeal-rqtl-kinki-lod-profile.qmd
        description: "Kinki (zigzag culm): binarized ordinal severity as empirical logit; R/qtl LOD profile + per-family scans; culm/meristem-architecture candidate panel"
  - id: zeal-inv4m
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "Inv4m genotype · 50K vs 200K"
        path: analysis/zeal-inv4m-rtiger-genotype.qmd
        description: "Genotype at the Inv4m tagging SNP (PZE04175660223) from the 200K (previous, Nirwan) and 50K (current, Fausto) RTIGER call sets: confusion matrix, BC2S3 goodness-of-fit, and the flowering-time LMM on each"
---

Analysis notebooks grouped by **dataset**, and within each dataset by the **paper**
the work supports. Two papers are being written here — the **nilHMM R package paper**
(priority) and the **ZEAL population paper** — plus the **Inv4m paper** (already
written, in review), which this repo supplies updated genotypes to.

## nilHMM methods

### §1 Foundations — missing data

The Poisson and exponential-with-floor model of missing data, fit to the ZEAL
population.

::: {#foundations}
:::

### §1 Foundations — genotype calling

Single-read genotype likelihoods and the prior's role in low-coverage calling, the
depth-driven emission choice, and why the SNP50K skim cannot resolve zygosity.

::: {#foundations-calling}
:::

### Engine & calibration

The shared HMM engine and its `simcross` calibration — common to every dataset below.

::: {#methods}
:::

## TeoNAM

W22 × 5 teosinte inbreds; 1,257 BC1S4 RILs (Chen 2019).

### nilHMM R package paper

#### Coverage-degradation reproduction — the results core

Reproduce Chen 2019 on real genotypes, then degrade coverage and re-call ancestry
with each caller: the GWAS-profile-under-simulated-coverage comparison.

::: {#teonam-recovery}
:::

#### Fig-4C model reproduction

Chen's actual Fig-4C mixed model (Q = 5 PCs + K = Centered-IBS, P3D).

::: {#teonam-fig4c}
:::

#### Calibration, map & marker framework

::: {#teonam-calmap}
:::

#### Supplementary — OLS computation & QC

The per-marker OLS computation behind the scans, reproducible from primary data.

::: {#teonam-supp}
:::

## ZEAL / ZEAL

::: {style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1.5rem;"}
![](zeal.png){fig-alt="ZEAL — Zea Exotic Allele Library" width="200"}

*Zea Exotic Allele Library*
:::

B73 × teosinte BC2S3 near-isogenic lines; SNP50K panel at ~0.4× skim.

### nilHMM R package paper

The ZEAL data used as method demonstration — caller agreement, ancestry painting
across sources, and the paired skim + BRB-seq cross-modality comparison.

::: {#zeal-methods}
:::

### ZEAL population paper

Trait QTL recovery on the ZEAL population (a reflection of the TeoNAM analysis):
JLM + MLM composites with five-caller comparison, at 1000-perm FWER.

::: {#zeal-pop}
:::

#### R/qtl (linkage-mapping) route

The classic linkage-mapping contrast to the MLM/JLM GWAS above: R/qtl (`bcsft`) interval mapping by
Haley–Knott on the RTIGER ancestry mosaic projected onto the TeoNAM JLM 0.1-cM grid, with multi-peak
deconvolution and per-family scans. All traits are scanned in **one joint run** (`scripts/zeal_rqtl_scan.R`)
sharing a single 1000-permutation null, then each notebook reads its per-trait results.

::: {#zeal-rqtl}
:::

### Inv4m paper (in review)

Updated-genotype support for the *Inv4m* inversion–flowering paper.

::: {#zeal-inv4m}
:::
